Short title and commencement.- (1) These rules may be called the Coinage of One Hundred Rupees and Ten Rupees Coins to commemorate the occasion of "l TER'{ATIONAL DAY OF YoGA " Rulet 2015. (2) They shall come into force on the date oftheir publication in the Official GazettE. 2. Denomlnatlon of colns .- The coins of the following denominations shall also be colned at the M int for issue under the authority of the Central Government to commemorate the occasion of "lNTERI{ATIONAI DAY OF YOGA " , namely:- (i) One Hundred Rupees; (ii) Ten Rupees. ir{rr sqqn Rtnr dft-il Fc qTTfi EiFI rrg ir+<r i qrr*; qq{ it (1) (2) (3) (4) q5 at €ct 35 qrc qi+ t 1/5of{i +s +< cr rer 6( q*( rtff } vfr i 0oo t 498 + 502 ffi 6r r{T{ d shrT r a* l.as ,r* ik qF qrq 3.26 qrq) -- 3 of 5 -- t6s'e 4 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA:EXTRAORDINARY [PARr u-sEc. 3(i)] 3. Dimension and composition ofcoins .- The coins ofthe denominations mentioned in rule 2 slrall conform to the following.limensions and composition, namelyi Ten Rupees 4. Design: - Tbe design ofthe coins shall be as under:- (i) ONE IIUIIDRED RT'PEES OBYERSE: The face of the coin shal 6ear the Lion Capitol of Ashoka Pillar in the center with the legend "IfFf*{ aqi' inscribed below, flanked on the left periphery with the word "Slilif in Dewagri script and on the right periphery flanked with the word "INDLA" in English and it shall also bear the Rupee symbol '?' and denominational value "100" in the intemational numerals below the Lion Capitol. REVERSE: The face ofthe coin shall bear the Logo of "Intemational Day ofYoga", with inscription Tfriqg vti lnfr t frq qtf in pevnagr Sffipt and 'YOGA FOR HARMONY AND PEACE" around rhe logo design. The date ,21 JLINE, is written at the bottom of the logo. The inscription "*-f{t$q fif fut8' in Devnagri script on left periphery and "INTERNATIONAL DAY OF YOGA" in English on the right periphery is written on this face of coin. The year's figure "2015" is written on lower periphary in international numerals exactly below the Logo.
